info.title: lsm-kv Explorer
info.description: REST API for an educational Log-Structured Merge Tree (LSM-Tree) key-value store. Provides endpoints for key-value operations, engine lifecycle management, memtable and SSTable inspection, compaction control, configuration, real-time statistics, and an interactive terminal.

get.description: Return the current engine status including uptime and data directory path.

post.description: Open (initialize) the LSM engine. No-op if already open.
Gracefully close the engine, flushing pending writes.
Close engine, delete data directory, and reopen with a fresh state.

Write a key-value pair to the LSM store.

The key and value are UTF-8 encoded and written to the active memtable.
A WAL entry is persisted before the write is acknowledged.

Delete a key by writing a tombstone marker.

The key is not immediately removed — a tombstone sentinel is written so
that subsequent reads return "not found". The tombstone is eventually
removed during compaction.

Execute multiple put and delete operations in sequence.

Each operation is applied in order. The response includes the range of
sequence numbers assigned across all operations.

get.description:
Read a value by key, searching memtable first, then SSTables.

Returns the source of the result (active_memtable, sstable, or miss)
and whether the key was found as a tombstone (deleted).

Walk the full lookup path step-by-step, returning a trace array.

The trace shows every component checked (active memtable, immutable
snapshots, L0 SSTables, L1+ SSTables) including bloom filter checks,
sparse index bisects, and block cache hits/misses.

List the active memtable and all immutable snapshots awaiting flush.

Returns metadata (table ID, entry count, size) for each memtable.

schema.title: Response Mem List Api V1 Mem Get

post.description:
Force-flush the active memtable to an SSTable on disk.

The active memtable is frozen, moved to the immutable queue, and
a new empty memtable is created. The flush pipeline will write
the frozen snapshot as a Level-0 SSTable.

get.description: Return all entries in a specific memtable (active or immutable) by its ID.

schema.title: Response Mem Detail Api V1 Mem  Table Id  Get

get.description:
List all SSTables organized by level (L0 through L3).

Each entry includes file ID, record count, block count, size, key range,
and sequence number range.

schema.title: Response Disk List Api V1 Disk Get

get.description: Return all key-value entries stored in a specific SSTable.

schema.title: Response Disk Detail Api V1 Disk  File Id  Get

get.description:
Return detailed metadata for a specific SSTable.

Includes level, record/block counts, size, key range, sequence range,
bloom filter FPR, creation timestamp, and file paths.

schema.title: Response Disk Meta Api V1 Disk  File Id  Meta Get

get.description:
Return bloom filter statistics for a specific SSTable.

Includes hash count, bit count, approximate false positive rate, and size.

schema.title: Response Disk Bloom Api V1 Disk  File Id  Bloom Get

get.description:
Return the sparse index entries for a specific SSTable.

Each entry maps the first key of a data block to its byte offset.

schema.title: Response Disk Index Api V1 Disk  File Id  Index Get

get.description: Return the current status of compaction jobs and active levels.

post.description:
Manually trigger a compaction check.

Compaction runs if the L0 SSTable count meets or exceeds the configured threshold.

get.description: Return the full compaction event log from compaction.log.
Return a point-in-time snapshot of engine statistics.
Return the ring buffer of stats samples (up to 300, sampled every 1 second).

Compute write amplification = total disk bytes written / user bytes written.

Disk bytes include current SSTables, historical compaction output that
has since been replaced, and the WAL file.
Return Write-Ahead Log metadata: entry count, size, last sequence number, and path.
Return all configuration parameters as a flat JSON object.

schema.title: Response Config Get Api V1 Config Get

patch.description:
Update a single configuration parameter at runtime.

Returns both the old and new values for confirmation.

get.description: Return the config schema with field names, types, and current values.

post.description:
Execute an lsm-kv REPL command and return text output.

Supported commands: `put`, `get`, `del`, `flush`, `mem`, `disk`,
`stats`, `config`, `config set`, `trace`, `help`, `clear`.

get.description: Serve index.html for all non-API routes (React Router handles client-side routing).

value.title: Value
value.description: The value (required for put, ignored for del).

BatchOp.title: BatchOp
BatchOp.description: A single operation within a batch request.

seq_range.title: Seq Range
seq_range.description: [start_seq, end_seq] range of sequence numbers assigned.

BatchResponse.title: BatchResponse
BatchResponse.description: Response for a batch write operation.

command.title: Command
command.description: The REPL command string (e.g. 'put mykey myvalue', 'get mykey', 'stats').

CommandRequest.title: CommandRequest
CommandRequest.description: An lsm-kv REPL command to execute.

output.title: Output
output.description: The text output of the command.

error.title: Error
error.description: True if the command produced an error.

CommandResponse.title: CommandResponse
CommandResponse.description: Text output from an lsm-kv REPL command.

events.title: Events
events.description: Chronological list of compaction events from compaction.log.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: ISO timestamp when the job started.

last_completed.title: Last Completed
last_completed.description: Timestamp of the last completed compaction.

triggered.title: Triggered
triggered.description: Whether compaction was actually triggered (L0 count >= threshold).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human-readable reason (e.g. L0 count vs threshold).

CompactionTriggerResponse.title: CompactionTriggerResponse
CompactionTriggerResponse.description: Response from a manual compaction trigger.

ConfigField.title: ConfigField
ConfigField.description: A single field in the config schema.

key.title: Key
key.description: The configuration key that was updated.

ConfigPatchResponse.title: ConfigPatchResponse
ConfigPatchResponse.description: Response after updating a config parameter.

ConfigSchemaResponse.title: ConfigSchemaResponse
ConfigSchemaResponse.description: Full config schema with types and current values.

DeleteRequest.title: DeleteRequest
DeleteRequest.description: Delete a key by writing a tombstone marker.

data_root.title: Data Root
data_root.description: Filesystem path to the data directory (when applicable).

open.title: Open
open.description: Whether the engine is currently open.

data_root.title: Data Root
data_root.description: Filesystem path to the data directory.

log_port.title: Log Port
log_port.description: TCP port for the structured log server.

uptime_s.title: Uptime S
uptime_s.description: Seconds since the engine was opened.

flushed.title: Flushed
flushed.description: True if data was actually flushed (false if memtable was empty).

snapshot_id.title: Snapshot Id
snapshot_id.description: ID of the flushed snapshot, if a flush occurred.

FlushResponse.title: FlushResponse
FlushResponse.description: Response for a memtable flush operation.

found.title: Found
found.description: Whether the key exists and is not deleted.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value, or null if not found / deleted.

source.title: Source
source.description: Where the result came from: "active_memtable", "memtable", "sstable", or "miss".

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: True if the key was found but is tombstoned.

seq.title: Seq
seq.description: Sequence number of the entry, if found.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value to associate with the key.

PutRequest.title: PutRequest
PutRequest.description: Write a key-value pair to the store.

StatsHistoryResponse.title: StatsHistoryResponse
StatsHistoryResponse.description: Ring buffer of stats samples (max 300, sampled every 1s).

key_count.title: Key Count
key_count.description: Number of keys in the active memtable.

wal_entry_count.title: Wal Entry Count
wal_entry_count.description: Number of entries in the Write-Ahead Log.

active_size_bytes.title: Active Size Bytes
active_size_bytes.description: Byte size of the active memtable.

immutable_queue_len.title: Immutable Queue Len
immutable_queue_len.description: Number of frozen memtable snapshots awaiting flush.

l0_sstable_count.title: L0 Sstable Count
l0_sstable_count.description: Number of Level-0 SSTables on disk.

compaction_active.title: Compaction Active
compaction_active.description: Whether a compaction job is currently running.

found.title: Found
found.description: Whether the key was ultimately found.

source.title: Source
source.description: The component that held the final result.

seq.title: Seq
seq.description: Sequence number of the found entry.

TraceResponse.title: TraceResponse
TraceResponse.description: Full trace of a key lookup through all storage layers.

last_seq.title: Last Seq
last_seq.description: Sequence number of the last WAL entry.

path.title: Path
path.description: Filesystem path to the WAL file.

user_bytes_written.title: User Bytes Written
user_bytes_written.description: Cumulative bytes written by user operations (key + value).

disk_bytes_current_sstables.title: Disk Bytes Current Sstables
disk_bytes_current_sstables.description: Total bytes of all current SSTables on disk.

disk_bytes_compaction_historical.title: Disk Bytes Compaction Historical
disk_bytes_compaction_historical.description: Bytes written by compactions whose output was later replaced.

disk_bytes_wal.title: Disk Bytes Wal
disk_bytes_wal.description: Current WAL file size in bytes.

disk_bytes_total.title: Disk Bytes Total
disk_bytes_total.description: Sum of SSTable, historical compaction, and WAL bytes.

write_amplification.title: Write Amplification
write_amplification.description: Ratio of total disk bytes to user bytes (disk / user).

WriteResponse.title: WriteResponse
WriteResponse.description: Response for a successful write (put or delete).

tags.name: kv
tags.description: Key-value CRUD operations — put, get, delete, batch writes, and lookup tracing.

tags.name: engine
tags.description: Engine lifecycle — open, close, reset, and status checks.

tags.name: mem
tags.description: MemTable inspection — list active and immutable memtables, view entries, force flush.

tags.name: disk
tags.description: SSTable inspection — list SSTables by level, view entries, metadata, bloom filters, and sparse indexes.

tags.name: compaction
tags.description: Compaction control — view active jobs, trigger compaction, and browse compaction history.

tags.name: stats
tags.description: Engine statistics — live snapshot, time-series history, write amplification analysis, and WAL info.

tags.name: config
tags.description: Runtime configuration — view, update, and inspect the config schema.

tags.name: terminal
tags.description: Interactive REPL — execute lsm-kv commands (put, get, del, flush, etc.) and get text output.
